description: An agent must process a folder of customer feedback emails to identify the most common complaints.

nodes.task_description: Ingest all emails from a specified folder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reads all email files.

nodes.task_description: For each email, classify the main topic of complaint (e.g., 'Product Bug', 'Slow Support', 'Billing Issue').

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns a correct category to each email.

nodes.task_description: Count the number of complaints in each category and report the top 3.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an accurate summary of the most frequent complaints.
